plan_kts:
data class LegInput(val name: String, val path: String)
data class RollupVerdict(val verdict: String, val rationale: String, val blockingFindings: List<String>)

fun plan(): RollupVerdict {
    val specSolvesIssuePath = "/tmp/gh-aw/agent/spec-solves-issue.json"
    val planImplementsSpecPath = "/tmp/gh-aw/agent/plan-implements-spec.json"
    val codeImplementsPlanPath = "/tmp/gh-aw/agent/code-implements-plan.json"
    val issueContextPath = "/tmp/gh-aw/agent/review-context.json"

    val repoContextReadme = readFile(".repo_context/README.md")
    val repoContextIndex = readFile(".repo_context/index.md")
    val repoContextMaintenance = readFile(".repo_context/maintenance.md")
    val repoIndex = readFile(".repo_context/generated/repo_index.md")
    val engineeringPrinciples = readFile(".repo_context/modules/overview/engineering-principles.md")
    val selfVerificationPlaybook = readFile(".repo_context/playbooks/upkeep/ai-self-verification.md")

    val issueContext = readJson(issueContextPath)
    val specSolvesIssueRaw = readJson(specSolvesIssuePath)
    val planImplementsSpecRaw = readJson(planImplementsSpecPath)
    val codeImplementsPlanRaw = readJson(codeImplementsPlanPath)

    val specSolvesIssue = normalizeAdherenceLeg("spec-solves-issue", specSolvesIssueRaw)
    val planImplementsSpec = normalizeAdherenceLeg("plan-implements-spec", planImplementsSpecRaw)
    val codeImplementsPlan = normalizeAdherenceLeg("code-implements-plan", codeImplementsPlanRaw)

    val repoRules = extractRollupRelevantRules(repoContextReadme, repoContextIndex, repoContextMaintenance, repoIndex, engineeringPrinciples)
    val sourceBackedChecks = verifyLegClaimsAgainstInputs(issueContext, specSolvesIssue, planImplementsSpec, codeImplementsPlan, repoRules)
    val consistencyReport = compareLegsForContradictions(specSolvesIssue, planImplementsSpec, codeImplementsPlan, sourceBackedChecks)
    val blockingFindings = collectBlockingAdherenceFailures(specSolvesIssue, planImplementsSpec, codeImplementsPlan, consistencyReport)
    val verdict = decideClusterVerdict(blockingFindings, consistencyReport)
    val selfCheck = applySelfVerification(selfVerificationPlaybook, verdict, blockingFindings)
    val finalVerdict = finalizeRollupVerdict(verdict, blockingFindings, selfCheck)

    writeFile("/tmp/gh-aw/agent/adherence-rollup-verdict.json", serializeJson(finalVerdict))
    return finalVerdict
}
